title: A Little Behind…
excerpt: Umm, that book says "Hello Spring, let's do this...". Considering it's now officially summer and I am just getting the chance to show you these projects, you could say I am a bit behind. There's a lot going on here…
body:
Umm, that book says "Hello Spring, let's do this...". Considering it's now officially summer and I am just getting the chance to show you these projects, you could say I am a bit behind. There's a lot going on here with work and trying to juggle and keep it all balanced. Wrapping up a lot of fun projects and videos for Here & There Inspiration, which starts next week! If you're finding that you're busy and behind, you can always sign up for the class and look at it later, since you'll have forever access.

I wish I had planned on making a layout similar to this every month for Jack. I suppose it's not too late to go back and do a few.

I love writing on my photos with Slick Writers. Supplies available at your local scrapbook stores and online at Two Peas In A Bucket and Simon Says Stamp.

And the main reason I am behind, is this little guy...
